scripts.build: bun run --cwd client build && bun run --cwd server build
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently "bun run dev:server" "bun run --cwd client build && bun -e \"const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/js', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/@neutralinojs/lib/dist/neutralino.js', 'dist/js/neutralino.js');\" && neu run"
scripts.desktop:build: bun run --cwd client build && bun -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/js', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/@neutralinojs/lib/dist/neutralino.js', 'dist/js/neutralino.js');" && neu build
